title: How to set a tracking abort line
description:
How to set a tracking abort line

How to set a tracking abort line

Set a tracking abort line in the following way.

Select
	 [Tools]-[Conveyor Tracking].

Select
	 the conveyor to configure.

Select
	 [Track Abort Line].

Check
	 the [Enable tracking abort line] checkbox.

4.1  Click [Teach]. The GUI will be displayed.

4.2
  If you want to enable the diagonal tracking abort line, check the [Diagonal Track Abort Line] checkbox.

Click [Teach]. The GUI will be displayed.

Follow
	 the steps in the window and finish the setting.
